name: TestWaitForUpdateCountGreater
title: TestWaitForUpdateCountGreater
syntax: long TestWaitForUpdateCountGreater(COValue value, qword count, dword timeoutMs)
description: Waits for the update counter of a communication object value to reach a certain value. Each CO value contains an update counter which is reset to 0 at measurement start and with explicit calls to valueEntity::ResetValueState. You can read out the counter with valueEntity::GetUpdateCount.
